entries.title: John 1:1 — The Word
paragraphs: The Word — the Son of God is here called the Word, because he is the perfect expression of the Father's mind and will; as our words reveal the mind, so the Son reveals the Father.
Was with God — denoting a distinction of persons, yet not a separation of essence, for he was also God.

entries.title: John 3:16 — God So Loved
paragraphs: So loved the world — the love of God is universal in its offer, embracing all manner of persons without distinction of nation or rank.
Whosoever believeth — faith is here set as the condition: not works, not birth, but the receiving of Christ as he is freely offered.
